title: Savory Chewy Light Polish Romano Pepper Crumble
description: A light and savory dish featuring roasted romano peppers that are crumbled over a base of garlic bread or as a side for an easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: To taste, but keep it mild as a dash-friendly dish

instructions: Slice the garlic bread in half and toast until golden brown. Remove from heat.
Gently mince the roasted romano peppers, removing seeds if desired for a smoother texture.
Crush the minced roasted peppers with the minced garlic clove to combine flavors.
Add salt and black pepper to taste and mix thoroughly.
Sprinkle the crumbled pepper mixture evenly over both halves of the toasted garlic bread. Serve immediately.
